title: Ruroc Atlas 4.0 Street TC-2

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner
specs.strap_type: Quick-Release Magnetic Buckle with Double D-Ring

technical_analysis: The Ruroc Atlas 4.0 Street TC-2 utilizes a proprietary carbon fiber weave architecture that significantly reduces mass while maintaining superior torsional rigidity compared to traditional fiberglass composites. This structural integrity allows for the integration of the Street TC-2 communication system without compromising the helmet's crash performance, as verified by rigorous ECE 22.06 testing protocols. The internal EPS liner features a multi-density foam configuration designed to manage energy dispersion across different impact vectors, ensuring optimal protection for both frontal and rotational impacts.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of lightweight performance with the Ruroc Atlas 4.0 Street TC-2, engineered specifically for the modern street rider who demands speed without sacrifice. Weighing in at a featherlight 1280 grams, this full-face helmet delivers an unparalleled sense of freedom while providing uncompromising safety standards. The sleek, aerodynamic profile slices through the wind, reducing fatigue on long rides and enhancing overall stability at high speeds.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Ruroc Atlas 4.0 Street TC-2: a lightweight carbon fiber full-face helmet with integrated comms, ECE 22.06 certification, and superior ventilation for street riders.
